settings.text:
Founded 10+ years ago by four friends who had a passion for great products that fueled adventure on and off the water, Huk has grown to over 100 employees around the US.

With our corporate office based in Charleston, South Carolina we know a thing or two about life on the water and we are passionate about creating high-performance gear that fits the lifestyle of the modern angler. Working at Huk means being part of a dynamic team that works hard but plays just as hard. We value creativity, teamwork, and a relentless pursuit of excellence, all in support of our mission to outfit anglers and other water-driven adventurers with best-in-class gear.

Learn more about our current open positions and apply below to join the crew.

settings.title: Asst. Manager - Dawsonville, GA
settings.text: Be a leader in our North Georgia Oulet location where you will plan and direct day-to-day operations of the store. Like the store manager, you will help develop strategies to improve customer service, drive store sales and increase profitability.

settings.title: Asst. Manager - Tampa, FL
settings.text: Take a lead role in our Lutz, FL - Tampa Premium Outlets - retail location where you will work with your peers meet sales goals, exceed customer expectations, and create a positive shopping experience for our customers.

settings.title: PT Key Holder - Tampa, FL
settings.text: Take a lead role in our Tampa Outlet located in Lutz, FL where you will work with your peers meet sales goals, exceed customer expectations, and create a positive shopping experience for our customers.

settings.title: PT Key Holder - Destin, FL
settings.text: Take a lead role in our Destin Outlet where you will work with fellow store associates and leadership to ensure the store is consistently recovered and consumer ready to drive excellent retail sales.

settings.title: PT Key Holder - Nashville, TN
settings.text: Take a lead role in our Nashville Outlet located in Antioch, TN where you will work with your peers meet sales goals, exceed customer expectations, and create a positive shopping experience for our customers.

settings.title: PT Key Holder - Panama City, FL
settings.text: Join the Huk PCB sales team. In this role, you will be the voice of the brand, elevate the customer's shopping experience and make genuine connections in partnership with your fellow sale associates.

settings.title: PT Sales Assoc. - Destin, FL
settings.text: Join the Huk Destin sales team. In this role, you will be the voice of the brand, elevate the customer's shopping experience and make genuine connections in partnership with your fellow sale associates.

settings.title: PT Sales Assoc. - Rehoboth, DE
settings.text: Be the voice of the Huk brand as you help customers through their retail buying experience through elevate customer service and genuine consumer connections while selling our innovative fishing apparel.

settings.title: PT Sales Assoc. - Smithfield, NC
settings.text: Join the Huk Smithfield sales team and be the voice of the brand on the sales floor. In this role, you will elevate the customer's shopping experience and make genuine connections in partnership with your fellow sale associates.
